column1: # Per-food native mass basis used by the diet/health pipeline.
# The model's nutrition.csv kcal/100g densities are calibrated against
# specific mass forms of each food: dry uncooked grain (flour-white at
# When intake data from external sources arrives in a different basis
# it must be converted before applying these densities or the resulting
# kcal totals are off by ~2-3x for cereals/legumes.
# This is a property of how the food appears on its food bus in the
# PyPSA model. The same food may have been processed from a crop input
# at a different moisture content; that conversion lives in foods.csv.
